since_last: 48% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.53%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.66% · Gold +0.41% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 48% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.53%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.53%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +19.94%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +19.94%, CEVA +6.71%, NXPI +2.28%, CGNX +2.24%, SMCI +1.99%. Laggards: DLR -5.03%, TTD -3.54%, WDAY -1.28%, SYNA -1.15%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.82% at $162.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
